1: Unto thee, O LORD LORD , do I lift up my soul.
2: Let me not be ashamed, let not mine enemies triumph over me.
3: Let them be ashamed which transgress without cause.
5: For thou art art the God of my salvation; on thee do I wait all the day.
6: For they have been have been ever of old.
7: According to thy mercy remember thou me for thy goodness' sake, O LORD LORD .
8: Therefore will he teach sinners in the way.
9: And the meek will he teach his way.
10: Unto such as keep his covenant and his testimonies.
11: Pardon mine iniquity; for it is is great.
12: Him shall he teach in the way that that he shall choose.
13: And his seed shall inherit the earth.
14: And he will shew them his covenant.
15: For he shall pluck my feet out of the net.
16: For I am am desolate and afflicted.
17: O O bring thou me out of my distresses.
19: And they hate me with cruel hatred.
20: Let me not be ashamed; for I put my trust in thee.
22: Redeem Israel, O God, out of all his troubles.
